MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC, DBA WESTLAKE FINANCIAL SERVICES' Motion To Vacate Dismissal And Restore Case To Previous Status.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tenttive ruling. Plaintiff's "motion to vacate dismissal and restore case to previous status" is granted; no timely opposition filed.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (302/RBU)
